Sovereign Organism

26 AI browser extensions. 11 SDKs. 11 protocols. Everything downloads. Everything runs offline. No GitHub needed.

Download ALL 26 Extensions Single zip — includes every extension + installers

🏗 Register

EXT-026
Builder AI — one-click install for all 26 extensions. Scans, validates, deploys.
Download

Install Without GitHub

Option 1 — From this folder (any OS with Node.js)

node organism-cli

Scans extensions, validates manifests, finds Chrome/Edge/Brave, launches with everything loaded.

Option 2 — Linux / macOS (no Node.js needed)

bash install.sh

Extracts zips and launches your browser. Works from a USB drive, download folder, anywhere.

Option 3 — Windows (double-click)

install-organism.bat        — double-click this
install-extensions.ps1      — or right-click → Run with PowerShell

Option 4 — Manual (any browser)

1. Download a .zip from above
2. Unzip it
3. Open Chrome → chrome://extensions
4. Enable "Developer mode" (top-right toggle)
5. Click "Load unpacked" → select the unzipped folder
6. Done — the extension is live

Option 5 — npm (SDKs only)

npm install @anthropic/sovereign-organism

Installs all SDKs as a single npm package. See sdk/ for individual packages.

Sovereign Organism — All of it is AI. All of it is intelligence. All of it is downloadable.
